prompt: Evaluate Karlavägen 12 — 91 days active, at Booli estimate mid, preferred area. Skill should autonomously investigate why listing is stale.
assertions: Output is valid, parseable JSON with no surrounding text
The value 91 (days_active) is referenced somewhere in the output — in summary, extra_findings, or writeup — confirming the skill flagged the staleness
At least one WebSearch was performed (skill must search for the address or listing to investigate why it has sat 91 days)
research.transit_nearest_station is populated with a non-null, non-empty value
research.transit_walk_minutes is a number and is 10 or less
research.grocery_walk_minutes is a number (populated, not null)
route is 'notify' or 'watch' — Östermalm/Karlaplan is a preferred area with no hard disqualifiers visible in the raw data
